name: execute_code
description: Execute TypeScript code in a sandboxed environment. All MCP tools are pre-wired as async functions on `tools` (e.g. `await tools.serena__find_symbol({ name: 'Tracker' })`). Hyphens in tool names are replaced with underscores. IMPORTANT: return a concise string summary — this is the ONLY thing returned to the LLM context. Raw tool responses stay inside the sandbox. Use this for any task requiring 2+ tool calls.

code.description: TypeScript code to execute. Use `await tools.server__toolname(args)` to call tools. Must return a string (or a value that converts to one).
